\sphinxAtStartPar
Aggregates the Mean, Median and quantililes in the highest frequency to the desired frequency.

\sphinxAtStartPar
The Function ensures, that we start at the beginning of a Year or Quarter depending on the chosen frequency
\begin{quote}\begin{description}
\sphinxlineitem{Parameters}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{frequency}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{str}}) \textendash{} The frequency to which the data should be aggregated to

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{reset\_index}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{boolean}}) \textendash{} Schould index be changed to period Index

\end{itemize}

\end{description}\end{quote}

\end{fulllineitems}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Creates fan plots of the desired variables.
\begin{quote}\begin{description}
\sphinxlineitem{Parameters}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{variable}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{list}}\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{ of }}\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{strings}}) \textendash{} variables for which the plot should be generated, all if it should be generated for all

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{save}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{boolean}}) \textendash{} Whether the plots should be saved. The default is True.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{name}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{string}}\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{, }}\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{optional}}) \textendash{} If the plots should be saved, path/name not including filetype. The default is None.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{show}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{boolean}}) \textendash{} Whether the plots should be shown. Default is True.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{agg}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{boolean}}) \textendash{} Whether the aggregated values should be shown

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{nhist}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{int}}) \textendash{} number of historical periods that should be shown on the plot
Default is 5

\end{itemize}

\end{description}\end{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Estimates the model using the model parameter specified in the initialization.

\sphinxAtStartPar
Save data in excel with a sheet for data in each frequency. Name sheets after frequency: Y,Q,M,W,D

\sphinxAtStartPar
Save conditionals for the forecasts for each frequency in one excel. Name sheets after frequency: Y,Q,M,W,D

\sphinxAtStartPar
Save transformation in excel with a sheet for each frequency. Name sheets after frequency: Y,Q,M,W,D
\begin{quote}\begin{description}
\sphinxlineitem{Parameters}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{io\_data}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{str}}) \textendash{} path to excel containing the data

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{io\_conditionals}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{str}}) \textendash{} path to excel containing the conditional forecasts

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{io\_trans}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{str}}) \textendash{} path to excel containing the transformations

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstyleliteralstrong{\sphinxupquote{hyp}} (\sphinxstyleliteralemphasis{\sphinxupquote{list}}) \textendash{} list containing the hyperparameters

\end{itemize}

\end{description}\end{quote}

\end{fulllineitems}
